domain: Bedouin bayt al-sha'r (بيت الشعر) black goat-hair tent: 3-ply fala'if hand-woven strips; dry-loose/wet-swell adaptive porosity (rain triggers fiber swell sealing gaps); oil-saturated goat-hair repels water; loose-weave convection produces 10-15°C cooler interior; tightly woven structure resists wind + sheds noise + insulates
specific_mechanism: BAYT-AL-SHAR-3-PLY-ADAPTIVE-FALA'IF-DRY-WET-DAMPING: per-layer gradient-feedback attenuation with (1) 3-ply layered gradient damping: per-layer gradient passed through 3 sequential damping filters {ply_1: high-freq, ply_2: mid-freq, ply_3: low-freq} mimicking tent layered structure; (2) dry-wet adaptive porosity α_porous: each gradient component's damping depth modulated by training-state — normal training ('dry') = α_dry loose damping; spike-detected ('wet') = α_wet tight damping (swell-shut); (3) oil-coated fiber pre-filter: shedding high-frequency gradient noise while preserving low-frequency signal; (4) heat-disperse vs water-seal regime switch G_regime: explicit binary regime gate; normal = heat-disperse (gradients flow), spike = water-seal (3-ply tighten to α_wet attenuation barrier); (5) loose-weave convection-style smoothing: in heat-disperse regime, gradient passes through 'convection' low-pass moving-average smoothing — analogous to air circulation through loose weave. Differs from R512 STRADIVARIUS-SELECTIVE-FREQUENCY-DAMP (per-band selective damping coefficient strong-fundamental preserve weak attenuate + plate-thickness graduated layer-wise gradient-norm budget β_l + wood-seasoning warmup phase gradual high-freq band attenuation + mineral-salt chemical pretraining data filter high-leverage contaminant remove, no 3-ply fala'if + no dry-wet adaptive porosity + no oil-coated high-freq shed + no regime-switch + no convection smoothing) by 3-ply layered filter + dry-wet adaptive porosity binary regime + oil-coated high-freq shed + heat-disperse-vs-water-seal regime switch + convection-style smoothing low-pass moving average.
llm_application: BAYT-AL-SHAR-3-PLY-ADAPTIVE-FALA'IF-DRY-WET-DAMPING per-layer gradient-feedback attenuation with 3-ply layered damping high-mid-low-freq filter + dry-wet adaptive porosity α_porous training-state regime modulated + oil-coated fiber pre-filter sheds high-freq noise preserves low-freq signal + heat-disperse-vs-water-seal regime-switch G_regime binary gate + convection-style smoothing low-pass moving-average. Differs from R376. R390. R417. R439. R448. R462. R487. R512 STRADIVARIUS-SELECTIVE-FREQUENCY-DAMP (closest — per-band damping + plate-thickness + wood-seasoning warmup + mineral-salt data filter). Differs from SPAM + Methods Stability + Gradient Grouping ACL 2025 + Layer-Wise Nuclear Norm by 3-ply fala'if + dry-wet adaptive + oil-coat + regime-switch + convection. Differs by 3-PLY FALA'IF LAYERED DAMPING + DRY-WET ADAPTIVE POROSITY + OIL-COATED HIGH-FREQ SHED + HEAT-DISPERSE/WATER-SEAL REGIME SWITCH + CONVECTION-STYLE LOW-PASS SMOOTHING.
novelty_claim: SPAM + Methods LLM Training Stability 2410.16682 + Taming LLMs Gradient Grouping ACL 2025 + Layer-Wise Nuclear Norm 2410.23743 cover gradient-spike + per-layer damping + gradient-grouping paradigm. BAYT-AL-SHAR-3-PLY-ADAPTIVE-FALA'IF-DRY-WET-DAMPING adds (a) 3-ply layered filter structure + (b) dry-wet adaptive porosity (regime-switch) + (c) oil-coated high-freq pre-filter + (d) heat-disperse-vs-water-seal binary regime + (e) convection low-pass moving-average smoothing. Recombination — borderline lookup.
